description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows on one side, allowing for ample natural light and a clear view into the interior spaces. The house includes a covered carport attached to the side, providing sheltered parking for a vehicle. The main entrance is marked by a set of double doors with glass panels, flanked by several rectangular windows. The upper floor has a balcony area with a railing, and the overall structure is composed of crisp, white surfaces with minimal ornamentation. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a mix of small and large panes distributed across the facade.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a covered carport. The design is geometric and minimalist, with white exterior walls and an open balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double glass doors, several rectangular windows, and the attached carport with a vehicle underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular geometry, upper balcony, and a mix of window sizes, with the carport partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, revealing interior spaces and emphasizing the open, modern design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid wall with minimal windows and the carport extending from the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features double glass doors, a small overhang, and is flanked by rectangular windows; no porch or decorative columns.
